dailyOutages.plant: At Rooppur 400kV Substation, the bus coupler between Bus-1 and Bus-2
dailyOutages.reason: for the first time at 12:00 hrs today. A load flow of around 28 MW is occurring from Gopalganj to Rooppur, and 4 MW from Bogura (West)  to the Rooppur bus. The load flow depends on the demand at Rooppur.
dailyOutages.full_desc: At Rooppur 400kV Substation, the bus coupler between Bus-1 and Bus-2 was switched on for the first time at 12:00 hrs today. A load flow of around 28 MW is occurring from Gopalganj to Rooppur, and 4 MW from Bogura (West)  to the Rooppur bus. The load flow depends on the demand at Rooppur.
